card_description: Christopher Dick is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick writes to Dorothy summarizing his 3-74 experience (the "conversion year")."

linked_segments.summary: Dick reflects on an interview with a reporter that clarifies his 1974 experience as the "answer" to his lifelong philosophical question "What is real?". He lists the physical and symbolic "causal fact
